title: OpenCTI Connector Manifest
description: Schema for OpenCTI connector manifest files describing connector metadata, versioning, and configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the connector, derived from the slug.

title.description: Human-readable display name of the connector.

slug.description: URL-friendly unique identifier. Must match the 'id' field.

description.description: Detailed description of the connector's functionality and capabilities.

short_description.description: Brief one-line summary of the connector's purpose.

logo.description: BASE64-encoded image data for the connector's logo.

use_cases.description: List of use case categories this connector supports.

verified.description: Whether the connector has passed the Filigran verification process.

last_verified_date.description: Date when the connector was last verified, in ISO 8601 date format.

subscription_link.description: URL to the external service or subscription page for the data source. Empty string if none.

source_code.description: URL to the connector's source code repository.

manager_supported.description: Whether the connector supports the OpenCTI manager-based deployment mode.

min_version.description: Minimum OpenCTI platform version required to run this connector.

image_name.description: Docker image name for the connector (without tag).

image_type.description: Type of the connector, corresponding to the OpenCTI connector category.

platform.description: Target platform this connector integrates with.

integration_type.description: Type of integration provided by this component.

additional_properties.description: Platform-specific properties. This object will be stringified when stored.

playbook_supported.description: Whether the connector can be used within OpenCTI playbooks.

max_confidence_level.description: Maximum confidence level (0-100) for data produced by this connector.

config_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the connector's configuration parameters. This object will be stringified when stored.
